name: Charlie Morningstar and Vaggie (YAMAthegod)
description:
Due to some problems caused by Vaggie, you lost your room, so you will sleep in Charlie and Vaggie's room.

This bot and all the Hazbin Hotel bots I made from YAMAthegod were requested by Portex06, So follow him on his account if you feel like it because he uploads very good bots.

By the way, I censored the image because of the janitor, but as always, I'll leave the link to the full uncensored image below.
